course.title: HTML & CSS Fundamentals
course.description: Learn the building blocks of the web: HTML for structure and CSS for styling.

chapter.title: Layouts and Images
chapter.description: Learn how to structure your page with divs and add images.

lessons.title: Working with Images
lessons.explanation: The `` tag is used to embed an image in a web page. It is an empty tag (no closing tag). The `src` attribute specifies the path to the image, and the `alt` attribute provides alternate text for screen readers.

exercises.statement: Add an image with the source 'https://picsum.photos/200' and an alt text of 'Random Image'.
exercises.hint: Use the tag with src and alt attributes.

lessons.title: Structuring with Divs
objectives: Group elements using the div tag
lessons.explanation: The `<div>` tag defines a division or a section in an HTML document. It is used as a container for HTML elements, which is then styled with CSS or manipulated with JavaScript.

exercises.statement:
Create a `
` container. Inside it, place a heading `

` that says 'Box' and a paragraph `

` that says 'This is inside a div'.
exercises.hint: Wrap the h3 and p tags inside a <div> tag.
